title: Checkpoint foundry repository to GitHub
summary: Create a tracked foundry task for the requested repository checkpoint and GitHub upload of the current local workflow-foundry state.
acceptance_criteria: workflow-foundry project state is loaded before checkpoint work
workflow state validation passes before any commit
the diff is inspected for sensitive data before upload
repository changes are committed locally with a Conventional Commit message
GitHub upload is completed only after a remote is available or explicitly configured

context_snapshot.summary: Load workflow-foundry state and every non-done task before continuing the GitHub checkpoint request.

session_log.event: Created intake task after user invoked native Codex planning for the foundry and requested uploading all current repo state to GitHub.

next_action: Create or confirm the native Codex plan, then implement it.
